/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/warehouse_app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/warehouse_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/warehouse_app.dir/src/ui_main_frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/warehouse_app.dir/src/warehouse/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/warehouse_app.dir/src/warehouse/storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/warehouse_app.dir/src/warehouse/ui_add_item_dialog.cpp.o -o warehouse_app  -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so
